chain.thought: Explanation: The first race was in 1926 and the last race was in 1939. Subtracting the years gives 1939 - 1926 = 13 years.

judge_thought: Explanation: The first race year listed is 1926 and the last race year listed is 1939. The time span from 1926 to 1939 is 1939 − 1926 = 13 years, regardless of any missing intervening years.
